geographic_restrictions: Massachusetts, with specific emphasis on Gateway Cities, rural communities, and historically underserved communities
project_area: Early childhood development, health, education, and community resilience
demographic_requirements: Communities historically underserved by Determination of Need dollars, with priority for early childhood changemakers and organizations serving young children and families
eligibility_summary: Open to organizations in Massachusetts working in early childhood, health, education, or community resilience. Priority given to grassroots, community-based, and early-stage innovators, particularly those serving underserved or rural communities. Some opportunities require specific project focuses like equitable access to care, food security, health & housing stability, arts & creativity, or broadband access.
